title: Skill Approval
description: Vendor approval for an Agent Skill in the AI Registry

skillId.description: Skill identifier using reverse-domain notation (e.g., io.github.anthropics/code-review)

source.description: Location of the skill folder in a git repository

url.description: Git repository URL containing the skill

path.description: Path(s) within the repository to skill folder(s). A single string for one skill, an array for multiple explicit paths, or a glob pattern ending with /* (e.g. "skills/*") to discover all skill folders containing SKILL.md under a prefix. Omit if the skill is at the repository root.

installConfigs.description: Tool-specific installation configurations. Omit if no tool-specific configuration is needed.

tool.description: Tool ID this config targets (must match a tool in the AI Registry)

installUrl.description: Deep-link URL for one-click install (tool-specific protocol)
